name: NeededPlus: Overhaul
description: V3 pack structured into brewing/ and crafting/ folders. Adds spirits, sodas, vinegar, tinctures, stills and bottling gear, chem drying, energy synergies, recycler expansions, and itemgroup merges. No mapgen. Updated to v0.3: integrated brewing/crafting/itemgroups. v0.4: hydroponics, materials/polymers 2.0, power distribution & safety added. v0.4.1 polish: activity-level audit, price/looks defaults, repair kits, uncrafts, abstractions, migrations. No mapgen.
